transactions: June 8, 2013:Drafted by theTampa Bay Raysin the17th roundof the 2013 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 9, 2015:Drafted by theLos Angeles Dodgersin the4th roundof the 2015 amateur draft. Player signed June 15, 2015.
July 31, 2017:Traded by theLos Angeles DodgerswithA.J. AlexyandBrendon Davisto theTexas RangersforYu Darvish.
June 23, 2022:Traded by theTexas Rangerswith cash to theSan Francisco GiantsforSteven Duggar.
January 12, 2023:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
December 7, 2023:Signed as a Free Agent with theLos Angeles Angels.
